page_title: Fullmetal Alchemist: To the Promised Day
text:
Fullmetal Alchemist: To the Promised Day (Hagane no Renkinjutsushi: Yakusoku no Hi e) is a role-playing PSP game by Bandai. Just like many other Bandai-released games, it was never released outside Japan. Unlike the last action PSP game, it follows the Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood story in more detail.
